item.title: ops/audit directory re-created by trace.ts without mode 0700 — decision trace log world-readable
item.intent: trace.ts must create ops/audit/ with mode 0700 when it does not exist — scaffold.ts was fixed by BUG-095, but trace.ts independently creates this directory and would produce it world-readable if called before scaffold, or if the directory was removed.
item.description: src/evolve/memory/trace.ts logDecision() line 37 calls mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }) without mode. TRACE_DIR='ops/audit' so this creates ops/audit/ with default 0755. BUG-095 fixed scaffold.ts to create ops/audit with 0700 at install time, but trace.ts is an independent call path — it creates the directory if it doesn't exist, and does so without the secure mode. No import from config/defaults.js exists in trace.ts today.
acceptanceCriteria: On a multi-user system, a user other than the agent owner cannot list ops/audit/ when the directory is first created by trace.ts rather than scaffold
ops/audit/ has mode 0700 regardless of which code path creates it — decision traces are never world-listable even if scaffold has not yet run
